mapper.sql: id, flow_id, version_number, status, orchestration_config, published_time, published_by, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_cp_flow_version_t WHERE flow_id = #{flowId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_cp_flow_version_t SET orchestration_config = #{orchestrationConfig}, version_number = #{versionNumber}, status = #{status}, published_time = #{publishedTime}, published_by = #{publishedBy}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
